feedback_text: Discovery motion templates need updating for recent rule changes. Still references old federal procedures that were amended in 2023. Causing confusion in federal court filings.
Damages calculator for future medical expenses needs updating. Doesn't account for medical inflation rates properly and underestimates long-term care costs significantly.
Client portal login system keeps timing out after 15 minutes of inactivity. Clients lose progress on document uploads and have to restart entire process.
Statute of limitations tracker is buggy for maritime injury cases. It keeps defaulting to standard personal injury timeframes instead of Jones Act provisions.
just used the trial preparation checklist generator - it's comprehensive but missing key items for federal court procedures. seems optimized for state court practice
Comparative negligence calculator for multiple-defendant cases is sophisticated. Properly allocates fault percentages based on evidence and jurisdiction precedents. Very impressive!
just discovered the batch document processing feature - uploaded 200 medical records and got summaries in 30 minutes. Saves days of time for mass tort cases!
Case outcome prediction model is eerily accurate. Tested it on 20 closed cases and it correctly predicted outcomes in 18 cases. The confidence scores help with settlement strategy.
medical records timeline is great but needs better filtering options. want to see just surgical interventions or just diagnostic tests, not everything mixed together
Medical records chronology feature saves brilliant amounts of time. Automatically sorts 400+ pages by date - used to take me two full days, now done in an hour.
Client communication AI generates empathetic, professional messages but sometimes uses overly complex legal jargon. Clients prefer simpler language explanations.
Medical record OCR is inaccurate on handwritten nursing notes. Accuracy drops to maybe 60% on cursive text, making transcriptions unreliable.
Automated research memo generation creates well-structured legal analysis but sometimes cites irrelevant cases. Need better relevance scoring in case law matching.
Deposition scheduling integration with court reporting services keeps double-booking. Sync issues between CC calendar and external booking systems.
Client intake form AI is too aggressive in suggesting case merit. Had three low-value cases flagged as high potential, wasted time on initial research. Need better screening.
Insurance policy analysis AI is incredibly thorough. Identifies coverage gaps, exclusions, and potential bad faith issues automatically. Essential for coverage disputes!
Medical records summarization for psychiatric injury cases is excellent. AI identifies key treatment patterns and medication changes that support mental anguish claims.
Document privilege review AI occasionally makes incorrect classifications, flagging attorney-client communications as discoverable. These inaccuracies are dangerous.
Witness contact management system duplicates entries when importing from external databases. Created 47 duplicate contacts for the same expert witness.
discovery compliance tracker is a lifesaver for complex cases. automatically monitors deadlines and flags potential sanctions risks. saved us from a major screw-up last week
Client portal integration saves huge time on status updates. Clients can track case progress automatically without calling the office - saves hours of phone time weekly.
Settlement authority calculator helps determine realistic ranges but doesn't factor in client's emotional attachment to certain outcomes. Need more nuanced psychological modeling.
Settlement conference preparation tool generates excellent talking points and identifies key pressure points for negotiations. Helped achieve 40% higher settlement!
Opposing counsel database is fantastic. Cross-referenced their settlement patterns and found they typically settle 30% higher in Q4. Using this intel in negotiations now!
case expense tracking is useful but needs integration with accounting software. manually entering expenses defeats the automation purpose
Automated citation checking for legal briefs is fantastic. Catches outdated case law and suggests more recent precedents. Makes brief writing much more reliable.
Automated citation checking for legal briefs saves so much time. Catches outdated case law instantly instead of spending hours manually verifying every citation.
Trial timeline generator creates comprehensive schedules but doesn't account for court holidays and local practice variations. Need jurisdiction-specific calendar integration.
Case value benchmarking tool crashes when analyzing cases with multiple defendants. Error occurs during liability apportionment calculations.
Case merit scoring system is completely inaccurate - rating obvious losers as 7/10 and solid cases as 4/10. The algorithm seems backwards and incorrect.
Medical expense projection tool accurately forecasts future treatment costs based on injury severity and treatment patterns. Essential for life care planning!
Jury selection bias analysis is groundbreaking. AI identifies subtle patterns in juror responses that predict verdict tendencies. This is the future of trial practice!
Automated court filing integration with state systems is buggy. Filed a motion in wrong format twice because CC didn't update for new local rules. Very embarrassing.
Settlement demand calculator produces different results when same information entered in different order. Seems like calculation logic has ordering dependencies.
medical record OCR works great on typed reports but struggles with handwritten nursing notes. accuracy drops to maybe 60% on cursive text
Calendar sync with Outlook keeps duplicating deposition appointments. Shows same depo at 2pm and 3pm. Causing scheduling conflicts with clients.
Jury questionnaire generator creates targeted questions based on case type and venue statistics. Helped identify biased jurors during voir dire process.
Client intake chatbot pre-screens cases effectively. Filters out obviously non-viable claims and collects good initial information. Saves paralegal time on initial consultations.
Case summary generator creates reports with incorrect medical terminology. Confuses 'cervical' with 'cerebral' and other terms. These inaccuracies are dangerous for client communications.
document production organizer works well for small cases but becomes unwieldy with 10,000+ documents. need better folder structure and search capabilities
Mediation brief generator creates well-structured documents but needs better customization for different mediator styles. Some prefer more aggressive positioning than others.
Client satisfaction survey automation helps track service quality and identifies areas for improvement. Data-driven approach to client relationship management.
Client intake chatbot saves significant paralegal time on initial consultations. Pre-screens cases and collects information automatically - saves 2-3 hours per intake.
Time tracking integration with billing software keeps losing entries. Logged 8.5 hours on case analysis but only 6.2 hours transferred to billing system.
Client portal integration is excellent. Clients can now track case progress, view documents, and get AI-generated status updates without calling the office. Huge efficiency gain!
Damages summary generator for closing arguments creates compelling narratives but needs more emotional language options. Current templates are too clinical for jury impact.
Trial exhibit organization AI saves weeks of preparation time. Creates logical presentation sequences automatically instead of manual organization that used to take forever.
Opposing counsel research tool is incredibly thorough. Provides win/loss records, average settlements, typical strategies, and even personality assessments. Game-changing intelligence!
Case status dashboard shows incorrect progress percentages. Discovery shows 100% complete but we haven't received all defendant responses yet.
Love the new case timeline feature! It automatically organizes all the key dates and saves me hours of manual chronology work. Huge time saver for our team.
Medical bill review AI is inaccurate, flagging legitimate charges as potentially fraudulent. Too many incorrect false positives requiring manual review.
Automated fee agreement generation creates compliant documents for different states. Ensures proper disclosures and terms based on jurisdiction requirements.
Document upload feature crashes when trying to upload medical records larger than 50MB. Error code: CC-DOC-500. This happens consistently on Chrome browser.
case similarity search is hit or miss. sometimes finds perfect matches, other times suggests totally unrelated cases. algorithm needs refinement for injury type matching
Jury consultant AI recommendations are spot-on. Suggested voir dire questions I never would have thought of that revealed key biases. Won a tough liability case because of it.

Called support because the AI keeps giving inaccurate damage calculations for slip and fall cases. Sometimes it says $50K, other times $120K for similar injuries. Very frustrating when preparing client presentations.
Statute of limitations monitoring for mass tort cases is essential. Tracks thousands of individual claim deadlines automatically. Prevents costly missed filings in MDL proceedings.
settlement authority matrix helps determine negotiation ranges but doesn't factor in client financial desperation. some clients will take anything to pay medical bills
hey team - anyone else notice that Case Companion is way slower this week? takes forever to load case summaries. might be a server issue?
Document privilege review AI is highly accurate but occasionally flags attorney-client communications as discoverable. Need more conservative settings for privilege protection.
Expert witness preparation AI generates excellent examination outlines and identifies potential weak points in expert testimony. Trial prep time reduced by 60%!
Lien resolution tracker saves tons of time on Medicare and insurance liens. Automatically calculates reductions - saves hours of manual paperwork per settlement.
The deposition summary feature saves incredible amounts of time. Fed it a 300-page deposition and got a perfect 5-page summary in minutes instead of spending days reviewing.
Settlement calculation is completely inaccurate for wrongful death cases. It's not factoring in lost future earnings correctly for younger victims. Please review the algorithm.
Case archival system needs better search functionality. Can't find closed cases from 2+ years ago without knowing exact case numbers. Very frustrating for reference research.
Settlement tracking dashboard won't update when payments are received in installments. Shows settlement as pending even after partial payments processed.
Damages calculator gives inaccurate projections for future medical expenses. Doesn't account for medical inflation rates properly and produces incorrect underestimates.
Trial exhibit organization AI creates logical presentation sequences and identifies key documents for emphasis. Streamlined our trial prep by weeks. Excellent tool!
Medical bill review AI flags legitimate charges as potentially fraudulent. Too many false positives requiring manual review defeats the efficiency purpose.
Integration with LexisNexis saves hours every week. Being able to pull case law directly into my research without switching platforms is a massive time saver.
Integration with LexisNexis is fantastic. Being able to pull case law directly into my research without switching platforms saves hours every week. Great work!
Medical illustration generator for injury explanations is incredible. AI creates accurate anatomical diagrams showing injury mechanisms. Juries understand complex injuries much better now.
Client communication templates save so much time and ensure consistent messaging. What used to take 30 minutes per client update now takes 5 minutes.
Client communication scheduler sends perfectly timed updates at key case milestones. Clients feel informed and engaged throughout the process. Excellent relationship management!
Would love to see better integration with our case management system (Needles). Currently have to manually export/import data which defeats the efficiency purpose.
anyone know how to adjust the sensitivity on the case merit scoring? it's rating obvious losers as 7/10 and solid cases as 4/10. seems backwards
trial exhibit numbering system keeps resetting when new documents added. losing track of exhibit organization is dangerous for trial presentation
Expert witness preparation AI saves massive time on trial prep. Generates examination outlines automatically - our trial prep time reduced by 60% and saves days of work!
Client intake form AI gives inaccurate case merit assessments. Had three low-value cases flagged as high potential, wasted time on initial research. Need better screening.
Automated demand letter generation saves hours but needs industry-specific templates. Insurance companies expect certain formatting and language conventions.
Document redaction AI saves hours of manual work. Automatically identifies and masks PII, medical info, and privileged communications. Accuracy rate seems very high.
Overall Case Companion has transformed our practice efficiency. ROI calculation shows 300% return in first year through time savings and better case outcomes. Highly recommend!
Medical records analysis feature gives error when processing handwritten notes. OCR seems to struggle with doctor handwriting (understandable!) but should handle more gracefully.
Expert witness matching algorithm is brilliant. Considers case type, budget, geographic location, and past testimony success rates. Found perfect biomechanics expert!
Settlement demand calculator produces inaccurate results when same information entered in different order. The inconsistent outputs show incorrect calculation logic.
Billing breakdown analysis saves hours of manual calculation work. Nice to see ROI on different case types without spending half a day with spreadsheets.
Expert witness database has inaccurate contact information. Found three experts whose firms they left years ago but system shows incorrect current employment.
Case summary generator creates reports with incorrect medical terminology. Confuses 'cervical' with 'cerebral' and other similar-sounding terms. Dangerous for client communications.
Client communication templates generated by AI are professional and empathetic. Saves time and ensures consistent messaging. Clients appreciate the clear explanations of legal processes.
Witness statement analysis AI is incredible. It cross-references all statements and flags inconsistencies automatically. Found contradictions that took me weeks to spot manually.
Voice-to-text feature is highly inaccurate with legal terminology. Keeps transcribing 'negligence' as 'negligents' and 'tort' as 'torte'. Needs legal dictionary training.
Jury instruction database is comprehensive and includes recent appellate decisions on standard instructions. Helps craft more persuasive and legally sound jury charges.
Expert witness database search returns outdated contact info. Found three experts whose firms they left years ago. Please update database or add verification dates.
Need better templates for demand letters in product liability cases. Current templates are too generic and don't address complex manufacturing defect theories adequately.
lien resolution tracker is super helpful for Medicare and insurance liens. automatically calculates reductions and tracks paperwork. saves tons of settlement delay
Document redaction AI saves hours of manual work. Automatically identifies and masks sensitive information - what used to take a full day now takes 30 minutes.
Expert witness cost calculator provides wildly inaccurate estimates for specialized fields. Quoted $500/hour for biomechanical engineer when accurate market rate is $800-1200/hour.
Statute of limitations tracker provides incorrect deadlines for maritime injury cases. It defaults to wrong timeframes instead of accurate Jones Act provisions.
Training materials are excellent but would benefit from more video tutorials. Written guides are comprehensive but visual learners on our team struggle with text-heavy documentation.
Client outcome prediction model helps set realistic expectations during initial consultations. Clients appreciate honest assessments based on data rather than false hope.

Statute of limitations tracker still uses wrong deadlines for maritime injury cases. It ignores Jones Act provisions and defaults to standard personal injury timeframes. This is the third time we have raised it.
The sanctions risk monitor is excellent. It tracks every statute of limitations deadline across our docket automatically and saved us from a missed filing last month. Essential feature.
the mobile app logs me out every single time i switch between wifi and cellular. cannot review case notes from the courthouse hallway which is exactly when i need them most

Damages calculator for future medical expenses is inaccurate for wrongful death cases. It is not factoring in lost future earnings correctly for younger victims and underestimates long-term care costs.
